query: SELECT ticker, signal, zivScoreAtEntry, entryPrice, exitPrice, exitReason, realizedPnl, realizedPnlPct, openedAt, closedAt, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, openedAt, closedAt) as holdMinutes FROM paperTrades WHERE sessionId = 25 ORDER BY realizedPnl DESC LIMIT 20;
